title: Account session-generation foundation
summary: JWT session과 auth identity epoch에 결합된 account generation, cutover fence/Hook/staging/quarantine/auth outbox를 additive dark-ship하고 #3 joint activation 전 production legacy authority를 유지한다.
goal: 탈퇴 전 세션 또는 UUID-only bootstrap이 동일 UUID의 새 계정 세대에 개인 데이터를 쓰지 못하도록 하면서, 기존 production 동작은 legacy 상태에서 그대로 보존한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, authority, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, design author/critic, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final over all five core plus two design gate artifacts, backend implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, frontend implementation, screenshot design authority, and final closeout; no session approves its own work
